data.title: Eli Lilly's drug Mounjaro outperforms Trulicity on heart health in a trial with 13,000+ participants over 4.5 years.
data.description: Eli Lilly and Co. announced results from the SURPASS-CVOT trial where Mounjaro (tirzepatide), a GIP/GLP-1 dual receptor agonist, was compared to Trulicity (dulaglutide), a GLP-1 receptor agonist. In the Phase 3 trial involving over 13,000 participants across more than four and a half years, Mounjaro met the primary objective by showing a non-inferior rate of major adverse cardiovascular events (MACE-3) - including cardiovascular death, heart attack, or stroke - compared to Trulicity. Although not adjusted for multiplicity-adjusted type-1 error, Mounjaro demonstrated enhancements in A1C, weight, renal function, and all-cause mortality. This marks the largest and longest study of tirzepatide so far. Find detailed coverage on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Comcast beats Q2 estimate, reports $30.31B revenue, $1.25 EPS. Media segment revenue up 1.8% to $6.44B, 41M Peacock subscribers.
data.description: Comcast Corporation (NASDAQ: CMCSA) exceeded expectations in its second-quarter results, showing a 2.1% year-over-year growth to $30.31 billion in revenue, surpassing analyst estimates of $29.80 billion. The company reported adjusted earnings per share of $1.25, beating the consensus of $1.17. The media segment saw revenue grow by 1.8% to $6.44 billion. Despite a light sports quarter, Peacock maintained 41 million paid subscribers quarter-over-quarter, with revenue rising by 18% to $1.2 billion, driven by the success of Love Island USA. Studios revenue increased by 8.0% year-over-year to $2.43 billion, mainly due to higher content licensing and theatrical performances.

data.title: Activia launches Gut Glow-Up campaign with new Proactive Yogurt & Dr. Amy Shah as Gut Glow-Up Guru, for internal health glow.
data.description: Activia introduces the Gut Glow-Up campaign, aiming to assist individuals in achieving a radiant transformation from within. This initiative is supported by science and features the inaugural Gut Glow-Up Guru, Dr. Amy Shah. The campaign offers tips, tools, and delicious gut health support to aid in this process of transformation.

data.title: Summize reports five years of 100% ARR growth, US ARR up 215%, global headcount up 49%, continuing momentum.
data.description: A fast-growing technology company, Summize, based in Boston and Manchester, England, has reported impressive metrics for their latest fiscal year ending in June 2025. The company has achieved its fifth consecutive year of 100% Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR) growth. Specifically, Summize's U.S. ARR saw a remarkable increase of 215%. Furthermore, the company expanded its global workforce by 49%. Over the last year, Summize reached significant milestones in customer satisfaction, product innovation, team growth, and gained notable recognition within the industry for its AI-powered Contract Lifecycle Management (CLM) solution.

data.title: Andersen Consulting teams up with Omni HR Consulting to strengthen organizational development capabilities. #BusinessNews
data.description: San Francisco- Andersen Consulting has expanded its human capital capabilities by entering into a Collaboration Agreement with Omni HR Consulting. This partnership will enhance Andersen Consulting's services through access to Omni HR Consulting's expertise. The agreement aims to strengthen Andersen Consulting's workforce solutions and provide clients with a wider range of human resources services. Both companies are optimistic about the benefits this collaboration will bring, highlighting the potential for increased efficiency and effectiveness in their operations. This move signifies Andersen Consulting's commitment to enhancing its offerings in the human capital sector, demonstrating a proactive approach to business growth and development.

data.title: Brian O’Donnelly appointed Corporate Vice President by FUJIFILM to lead Electronic Materials Business growth, retaining role as CEO.
data.description: In Tokyo, FUJIFILM Corporation has appointed Brian O’Donnelly as its Corporate Vice President to enhance global leadership in the Electronic Materials Business. O’Donnelly will serve as the President and CEO of FUJIFILM Electronic Materials USA, Inc. and Senior Deputy General Manager of the Electronic Materials Business Division at FUJIFILM Corporation. Additionally, he will take on the role of Global Vice President. This move aims to drive growth, showcasing the company's commitment to expanding its presence in this sector.

data.title: In July, job cuts surged by 140% from last year, while Fed's inflation rate exceeded expectations; S&P 500 rose.
data.description: In July, job cuts surged by 140% compared to the previous year. Additionally, the Federal Reserve's preferred inflation indicator showed a significant increase. The S&P 500 saw an upward movement amidst these developments.

data.title: QI Tech secures $63M in Series B extension led by General Atlantic, boosting its position in Brazil's financial sector.
data.description: QI Tech, a prominent financial infrastructure fintech company based in SÃO PAULO, announced on July 31, 2025, that it has successfully raised $63 million in funding. This substantial investment showcases the high level of investor trust in the company and significantly strengthens its financial position. The funding will enable QI Tech to seize strategic opportunities and further enhance its market presence.

data.title: 2U launches 6 IBM microcredentials for AI and data workforce with live instruction and flexible format.
data.description: A recent announcement from 2U, a prominent education technology company, brings news of new cohort-based programs designed to impart high-impact skills tailored to the dynamic tech economy of today. These programs offer live instruction, personalized support, and a flexible learning format, catering to the needs of modern learners. This initiative signifies a move towards equipping individuals with relevant skills in a rapidly evolving industry landscape.

data.title: AtlasClear Holdings provides update on financing and partnership with Hanire LLC (NYSE: ATCH), anticipating funding shortly.
data.description: AtlasClear Holdings, Inc., based in Tampa, Florida, recently disclosed developments regarding their planned financing and collaboration with Hanire LLC. The company, traded on NYSE American under the ticker symbol ATCH, shared updates on the investment agreements with Hanire, aiming to enhance the transaction for shareholders. President Craig Ridenhour highlighted the forthcoming funding and improvements to benefit shareholders. This disclosure follows shareholder requests for clarity, signaling progress in the partnership.

data.title: American Lighting launches TINSL, new seasonal lighting line to brighten holidays, ensures shine all year.
data.description: A popular lighting manufacturer, American Lighting, based in Denver, has recently launched a new line of seasonal and holiday lighting called TINSL. This innovative product line aims to bring wonder and built-in shine to various settings throughout the year. TINSL is designed to embody American Lighting's commitment to creating inspiring lighting experiences for residential, commercial, and specialty projects. With a focus on delivering quality and reliability, the company has continuously provided trusted products for many years. The introduction of TINSL signifies their dedication to illuminating every season, space, and celebration. This new line is poised to enhance festive decorations and add a touch of magic with its unique lighting designs.

data.title: Embassy REIT leases record 2M sq ft in Q1 FY2026, reports results for Q1 ended June 30, 2025.
data.description: In Bengaluru, India, Embassy Office Parks REIT (NSE: EMBASSY / BSE: 542602), known as Embassy REIT, announced its first-quarter results for the period ending June 30, 2025.

data.title: Immunophotonics finishes trial of IP-001 for advanced tumors; sets way for cancer immunotherapies.
data.description: Immunophotonics has introduced IP-001, its exclusive glycan polymer, aiming to revolutionize tumor ablation into personalized systemic cancer immunotherapies. The company, located in St. Louis, made this announcement on July 31, 2025. Immunophotonics Inc. is a clinical-stage biotech organization that specializes in creating groundbreaking immunostimulatory medications.

data.title: PREMIUM Development sells FIFTEEN luxury apartments in Miami, marking milestone in U.S. project. Walker & Dunlop brokered.
data.description: In Miami on July 31, 2025, PREMIUM Development Inc. announced the successful sale of their latest U.S. venture, FIFTEEN Apartments. This upscale multifamily community in Miami's Health District features a boutique, European-style design. The sale was managed by the brokerage firm Walker & Dunlop.

data.title: Quantum Computing Market booming: Average funding rounds exceed $50M, reaching $1B in investments in 2024.
data.description: A report titled "Global Quantum Computing Market 2026-2046" has been included in the offerings of ResearchAndMarkets.com. The quantum computing market has experienced a significant shift in 2025, marked by rapid technological advancements, substantial investments, and the introduction of practical quantum applications in various sectors. In 2024, global quantum investments exceeded $1 billion for the first time, reflecting a continuation of the positive trajectory in the industry.
